description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ci that runs on push to master and tweaks branches, and on pull requests to master. The workflow has two jobs: test-big-endian and test-little-endian, both running on ubuntu-latest. test-big-endian uses a matrix strategy to test multiple Python versions, while test-little-endian runs on a s390x architecture with Ubuntu 20.04, installing dependencies and running a test script in both cases.
